context: User requests a full consolidation workflow after a long session

checklist.name: Runs --propose first
checklist.description: The response includes running `vault-cli consolidate --propose` as the first command

checklist.name: Instructs user to review in Obsidian
checklist.description: Explicitly tells the user to open Obsidian and review/approve the consolidation proposals before continuing

checklist.name: Runs --apply only after review
checklist.description: Includes `vault-cli consolidate --apply` as a subsequent step, after the user has reviewed

checklist.name: Does not auto-apply without user review
checklist.description: Does NOT run both --propose and --apply in a single uninterrupted sequence without a user action in between

checklist.name: Explains what happens during apply
checklist.description: Mentions that approved proposals become semantic memories and source episodics are marked superseded (not deleted)

checklist.name: Correct command syntax
checklist.description: Both commands use correct syntax: `vault-cli consolidate --propose` and `vault-cli consolidate --apply`
